steps.title: Use the geography signal
steps.content: The text says earlier mixopterid fossil evidence came only from Laurussia. The new fossil was found on Gondwana, and the text says this expands understanding of mixopterids' geographical distribution.

steps.title: Separate scope from timing
steps.content: A focuses on age, B focuses on relationships to modern animals, and C focuses on evolution and timeline. The significance is that the fossil shows mixopterids beyond Laurussia. The answer is D.
